acceptance_criteria_met: Card with summary → Card renders → Summary displays below title (2-3 lines, truncated)
Summary > 150 chars → Card renders → Summary truncated with "..." and "Read more" button
User taps "Read more" → onPress fires → Summary expands to show full text, "Show less" button appears
User taps "Show less" → onPress fires → Summary collapses to 2-3 lines
Card without summary → Card renders → Only title shows (no empty space, no error)
Expanded card → User refreshes feed → Expansion state resets (default collapsed)

implementation.summary: Created shared SummaryText component with expand/collapse functionality using NativeWind className and semantic theme tokens. Integrated into all 4 card variants (VideoCard, ReleaseCard, SocialCard, ArticleCard). Component returns null when no summary provided, enabling title-only fallback. Per-card expansion state managed with useState, smooth animations via LayoutAnimation.
key_features: Shared SummaryText component for consistent truncation across all card types
Null return when no summary (title-only mode)
